holdings.infoBox: GBUG is an equity ETF with a total of 48 individual holdings. The top holdings are G Mining Ventures stock at 4.70%, DPM Metals at 4.60%, IAMGOLD at 4.14%, Coeur Mining at 3.86%, and Discovery Silver at 3.71%.

overview.description: The Sprott Active Gold & Silver Miners ETF (GBUG) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in materials equity. The fund is an actively managed ETF that provides exposure to gold and silver mining companies from around the world. The fund targets equity securities associated with the exploration, development, and mining of gold and silver considered undervalued by the market GBUG was launched on Feb 19, 2025 and is issued by Sprott.
